Index.meta_title: H&T AI TECH — AI & Software for Real Operations
Index.meta_description: H&T AI TECH designs and delivers AI systems, custom software, and engineering teams for enterprises and smart-city programs in Vietnam and beyond.

Hero.title: Build AI that holds up in real operations
Hero.description: We help companies and cities turn ideas into working software — computer vision, machine learning, and dedicated engineering teams based in Da Nang.

HomeServices.title: Ways we partner with you
HomeServices.description: Whether you need specialists on your team or a full build from H&T, we keep scope clear and delivery accountable.

DeliveryProof.title: Quality gates we use on every AI release
DeliveryProof.item1_description: We document decisions, data paths, and failure cases before choosing models or writing production code.
DeliveryProof.item2_description: Accuracy, latency, and acceptance criteria are agreed up front so progress is measurable.
DeliveryProof.item3_description: Permissions, human review, logging, and fallbacks are part of the launch plan — not extras.
DeliveryProof.item4_description: We track reliability, cost, and usage so improvements stay grounded in real performance.

CTA.title: Tell us what you want to build
CTA.description: Share your goals, timeline, and constraints. We will recommend a team, a product sprint, or a discovery workshop.

HeroService.title: AI, software, and teams for ambitious products
HeroService.description: From staffed engineering squads to computer vision platforms and cloud foundations — choose the engagement that fits your roadmap.

HowweworkService.title: A practical path from kickoff to first release
HowweworkService.description: We start with clarity, staff the right specialists, and expand only when delivery is already working.

ServicesCatalog.hire_description: Place experienced developers, AI specialists, and QA into your existing workflow with clear ownership.
ServicesCatalog.product_description: Take a concept or pilot and turn it into software your users and operators can rely on every day.
ServicesCatalog.agentic_description: Design agent workflows with tool use, review steps, and monitoring for real business processes.
ServicesCatalog.cloud_description: Strengthen infrastructure, data pipelines, and deployment practices so AI workloads stay stable.
ServicesCatalog.data_description: Build retrieval, pipelines, and reporting layers that keep models connected to trustworthy data.
ServicesCatalog.ux_description: Create dashboards, review screens, and operator tools that make AI outputs easy to trust and act on.
ServicesCatalog.vision_description: Deploy detection and inspection models for safety, logistics, and smart-city monitoring.
ServicesCatalog.ml_description: Train, evaluate, and operate models tailored to your domain — with handover your team can maintain.
